review_title: I use Online Check Writer daily and I am satisfied that I selected that product
description: I started to use that product several weeks ago and I would like to say that I am fully satisfied user. I like accept my payment via the link. The overall experience is amazing.
author: Danylo K.
pros: I like the interface. It's very easy to digest. Secondly, I am amazed that my business bank operations are in pocket and I am able to recieve and ask for a payment. What I am grateful for is that there's Advanced Two Factor Authentication.
cons: I am not sure I could see my default currency information on the Bank Data. It would be useful because I have 2-3 bank accounts with different currencies. On a business tools menu there's a View more button but I would prefer seeing that features listed right there.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Easy to use and can be used anywhere
author: Young Jun K.
pros: You can easily know when, where and how much you have used at any time, even if you do not record separately, and it is easy to use and can be used anywhere.
cons: Occasionally, when there is a change in the position of what I have designed, I have to go back into the design and adjust it.

author: Latoya W.
pros: Ease of use to maneuver product and also prints clean and precise once set up properly.
cons: Get locked out too much so has to call help desk.

description: I love this product. I would continue to use it forever.
author: Saif A.
pros: Ease of use. Versatile. The options are very well thought of.
cons: The initial setup was a little difficult but that only makes the product that customizable.

author: Chuck S.
pros: This is a nice and easy product to use. I use it once a week or so and there is no refresh time needed
cons: Took a bit or wrangling to get the check function to print what I wanted as there are a lot of pre-installed entries and I have pre printed checks

review_title: Used to be a happy customer
description: Like I said, it was a great piece of software when we started using it. I've asked for the zil account and accompanying wallet to be removed because we are a nonprofit, only the board can make a decision about creating new accounts. But it's been many months and they haven't done it yet, so I'm pretty sure they never will. It's so frustrating, they even send us monthly zil statements. We're probably going to switch back to our payroll system for ACH, because it's too confusing the way it's set up now.
author: Lynn M.
pros: I used to like it much better before we added ACH. The check writing worked great, it was intuitive and easy to use.
cons: The user interface changed without warning a few months ago from something that was really easy to use to something that doesn't even fit on my computer screen and I have to reduce my magnification to 90% to see it all. I have to hunt all over the place to find various features that were all previously in one place. At least they should have given us some warning, I was on vacation and the admin using it was texting me that she couldn't figure out how to send ACH anymore. When we set up ACH they created a zil account for us which we didn't ask for and didn't want. It generated an automatic wallet that is identically named to our real wallet and it's been so confusing. It's unclear to me what enable wallet bypass means in the two different places it can be entered, both in the wallet settings and when we actually send an ach payment. We're always afraid we're doing something wrong.

description: Has many powerful features, however it can be overwhelming and confusing trying to understand every aspect.
author: Ronald A.
pros: The many features regarding check writing and security.
cons: Moves too slowly, even on my fastest computer it took long for pages to load.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: If you don't want to bend the knee to Intuit ...
description: It's been the best/easiest way to print my own checks that I've found.
author: Adam T.
pros: I can print checks the way I want for a much lower price than Intuit was offering.
cons: Creating checks could be a little streamlined, especially monthly recurring checks.

description: Amazing best service around. Customer support could be better. I don’t use the cloud banking services
author: Joshua C.
pros: I loved the ability to print checks, have virtual cards issued and even have checks mailed. Best thing around
cons: The costs. I didn’t like that for most of the features you have to pay for them with other providers you get that all included

description: Overall, my experience has been very positive. The platform has simplified my payment management and given me peace of mind with its security. It’s a great value for the money, and I use it regularly for both personal and business needs.
author: Jun W.
pros: I really like how easy it is to create and print checks. The interface is user-friendly, and the payment processing and money transfer options save me a lot of time. It also feels secure and reliable.
cons: Sometimes there’s a slight learning curve when exploring advanced features, and I wish the reporting tools had more customization options.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Blake D.
pros: I love how you can make Checks online and it’s so easy to do so. Especially if it’s hard to get checks from your current bank
cons: None at this time. If I see anything then I’ll submit another review.

review_title: Online Check Writer - Getting the Job Done
description: Right now Online Check writer serves as a single place to go for check printing across all of our entities. It gets the job done for that although I know there are other useful features available.
author: James G.
pros: We use online check writer to print paper checks from BILL, QBO, and Desktop Enterprise. It does that pretty well for the most part.
cons: My QBO imported checks are different than what is imported from QB Enterprise and I don't know how to change it. For example, my QBO imported checks don't have remittance information on the middle section of the stub.

description: Love the ease of the system and how helpful it is to our business.
author: Jill L.
pros: The system is easy to use and easy to set up to what you need. Make life easier by printing checks instead of writing them out.
cons: Wish when they do updates they lets us know how to use them.

author: Manik N.
pros: Cloud based online system that can be used anywhere.
cons: Price is now ridiculous and very con artist.

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Online check writer is very much awesome, it is a big help , a secure software and a easy to use,the software is a secure platform to move money seamlessly ...

description: Over all I love it and will continue to use it.
author: Tammie H.
pros: I like the ability to email payments to our servers. I like the ability to be able to send payments from any device quickly. I like the ease of use and easy learning curve.
cons: They offer direct deposit free but charge for emailing a check. Feel that it should be the other way around since email really doesn’t create any extra work like a direct deposit would. Also would like to be able to enter a date on each individual line of a deposit slip without having to type it in and click on the date, would like to have a calendar pop up to choose a date on each line.

description: My overall experience was a good one.if I'm honest i was not expecting much in the beginning. But a full 6 months with it....Im glad we decided to go with the online check writer.
author: Armando R.
pros: The pay as you go option charges you only want you use which in my case was less than a monthly or annual subscription. Not that the other 2 where expensive, it just makes more sense pay as you go in my situation. The monthly and annual plans are both very well competitively priced vs other name brand software.
cons: At the moment i do not have a negative thing to speak about this software. I know there is somethings i disliked but at the moment nothing to report.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Pretty good. Very glitchy software but I think OCW has a lot of potential so that's why I am sticking with it
author: JeanSebastien V.
pros: I like the segregation of duties: one person can cut enter data, another approve checks and another print the check. I love the new QBO integration
cons: Very very glitchy. Sometimes things do not sync with QB

review_title: Could be great with a little effort!
description: I thought I would have more functionality from the program, but I can perform all the same functions using my bank's bill pay option. I cannot add field checks that are required for my customers, and therefore I cannot do accurate reporting. The reporting function has information from when the account was being tested, and the transition to a paid account was not good. There were supposed to be credited to my account every month, but each time I use the program, I have to contact support to print checks or deposit slips.
author: Cody F.
pros: The nice feature is the customizable check-writing design. The design possibilities are entry-level but serve a basic purpose if you want a simple check writing ability.
cons: The program is not customizable to the needs of other industries where you may need additional fields for data and reporting. The program often did not work as expected, and the transition from a fee to a paid plan has been nothing short of a nightmare. The information in its knowledge base does not match the program's, causing confusion.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: OLCW Needs to Improve It's Systems
author: Lauren D.
pros: Customer support is helpful and easily available but usually needed after the fact(changes are made and not communicated to users.)
cons: The platform does a poor job of communicating changes with users, including price changes, design updates, and changes.

description: Great -- I couldn't live without it.
author: Erik J.
pros: I like that I can click to write checks and mail them.
cons: Sometimes the application is buggy, but support has been wonderful and responsive.

author: Mikheil G.
pros: It's very easy to use and quick and offered wide range of options.
cons: Well I feel like it not fully polishes yes and need little work.

review_title: Great alternative to Quickbooks for printing checks..
author: Kelley T.
pros: It works great and I can modify as needed.
cons: I wish it would use the imported vendor address and not the previously saved. I've sent several checks to the wrong address because I updated it in Quickbooks, but it still printed as old address.

author: Randall S.
pros: It allows quick payment to vendors and others.
cons: It has just raised the price which affects the bottom line.

review_title: If it fits your needs use it
description: its good and it fits my needs. MY OVERALL EXPERIENCE HAS BEEN GOOD. I EVEN SIGNED UP FOR A ZIL BANK ACCOUNT THROUGH THEM.
author: Mathew M.
pros: i like the ability I LIKE THE ABILITY TO CREATE AND CUSTOMIZE MY CHECKS SO THAT I DONT HAVE TO ORDER EXPENSIVE ONES FROM THE BANK
cons: I dont like that it lags I DONT LIKE THAT IT LAGS A LITTLE. IT ALSO HAS SO MANY FUNCTIONS ITS COMPLICATED. DUMB IT DOWN A LITTLE.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial
